results.title: Global Yoga Sessions Celebrate the 12th International Day of Yoga
results.description: As the 12th International Day of Yoga approaches, Indian diplomatic missions around the world are organizing yoga sessions to promote holistic health and well-being. With the theme 'Yoga for Healthy Ageing', events are taking place in countries like Kuwait, Finland, the Philippines, and the USA, showcasing the benefits of yoga across generations. From large gatherings in Kuwait to midnight yoga in the Arctic, these celebrations highlight the importance of yoga in fostering a balanced lifestyle. Join the global community in embracing the timeless practice of yoga for a healthier future.

results.title: Swimming In Summer? Simple Eye Care Tips That Could Save You From Painful Infections
results.description: Swimming is a fun activity during summer vacations; however, prolonged exposure to pool water can irritate the eyes.
